description: render a VSS incident payload into the Slack Block Kit blocks + OpenClaw Dashboard markdown the relay would post (offline, no network)
rules: pure/offline — no Slack token, no running server, no VST, no network required
exercises the vendored pure formatters build_slack_blocks / build_dashboard_message / build_test_incident
with no INCIDENT file it renders the synthetic build_test_incident() payload
read-only — produces preview artifacts only; sends nothing to any backend
usage: Optionally set INCIDENT to a path to an incident JSON file (VSS webhook payload). If unset, the synthetic test incident is rendered. The porter runs the vendored formatters under RECORD_STORE and records one JSON audit line. Outputs: render.json (audit), rendered.json (slack blocks + dashboard markdown).
limitation: Renders only the verdict/category/sensor/place/timestamp/reasoning/prompt/videoSource fields present in the incident payload. Does not resolve a videoSource via VST (that happens only inside the live relay), does not authenticate to Slack, and does not deliver the notification.
